Name: Pict Nonlinearconfig
Tagline: Nonlinear configuration manager built on Pict for multi-step, branching configuration workflows

		H 24

					<circle cx="48" cy="48" r="28" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)" stroke-width="3.5"/>

			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">PN</text>
	</svg>
